summary: NIRGRANTHA is a closed, institution-specific, AI-powered EdTech platform (formerly called SmartCampus) designed to transform Tier-2 Indian engineering colleges. It features 4 portals (Student, Teacher, Institute, Parent) with modules covering academic roadmaps, AI-powered calendars, campus guides, career navigation, hackathon team matching, and a project marketplace. The website starts with a 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA' landing page, followed by a role-based login page that routes users to their respective dashboards.
architectural_notes: Stack: React.js (web), React Native (mobile), Node.js + Express (backend), PostgreSQL + MongoDB, Python FastAPI for AI/ML
Platform is institution-specific and closed — not a public social network; acts as a bridge to GitHub, LinkedIn, LeetCode, NPTEL
Biometric auth (facial recognition via OpenCV/FaceNet + fingerprint) used for daily login after initial credential setup
AI components: NLP chatbot, adaptive notification engine, dropout predictor, smart board AI, automated parent report generator, scam detection NLP
External integrations: GitHub API, LinkedIn API, LeetCode API, Google Classroom API, NPTEL/SWAYAM, Razorpay for marketplace payments
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Abstract dark-gradient hero background with subtle glowing circuit-board or neural-network line art motif in deep teal and gold tones (nirgrantha-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Stylized NIRGRANTHA wordmark logo with a geometric academic cap or connected-node icon in gold and white on a transparent background (nirgrantha-logo.dim_480x120.png)

existing_features.title: Create a full-screen welcome landing page as the very first screen users see when visiting the site. It must prominently display 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA' as the hero heading, include the company name 'NIRGRANTHA' styled as the brand, and provide a clear call-to-action button (e.g., 'Get Started' or 'Enter Portal') that navigates the user to the role selection / login page. This page should appear before any login or role selection UI.

Update the app navigation flow in App.tsx to introduce a new 'welcome' view state as the initial state (replacing 'landing' as the first shown view). The sequence must be: welcome page → role selection/login page → role-specific dashboard. Ensure the existing role-based login and dashboard logic is preserved unchanged.

Apply a visually rich, cohesive design theme to the welcome landing page that reflects NIRGRANTHA's identity as an AI-powered EdTech platform for Indian engineering colleges. Use a bold, modern color palette with deep gradients, elegant typography for the brand name, subtle animated or decorative background elements, and a professional yet energetic visual style. Ensure the theme is consistent with the existing portal design tokens defined in the project.

new_feature_requests.summary: Welcome landing page with 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA' branding as the entry point before login
Role-based login page routing students, teachers, institute staff, and parents to their respective dashboards
Student Portal with 6 modules: Academic Roadmap, AI Calendar, Campus Guide + Scam Alert, Career Navigator, Hackathon & Events Network, Project Marketplace
Teacher Portal with lesson continuity engine, material uploads, smart board AI integration, and anonymous student feedback
Institute Portal with HOD activity feed, healthy HOD competition display, smart lab booking, startup incubation module, and analytics
Parent Portal with read-only AI-generated monthly growth reports, welfare alerts, and activity summaries
